reviews.review_description: I really loved this game.  It reminded me of Double Dragon in VR.  I tried to play it with a friend about 1.5 years ago and constantly had trouble matching up with him to play.  It seemed like 90% of the time we tried to coop, it wouldn't find him and connect.  We were eventually able to get through the whole game but it was frustrating.  I would love to play this with my son but last time I tried, it wouldn't connect.
I wonder why no one plays this anymore it’s amaxing

reviews.review_title: It was a short but good game
reviews.review_description:
This game definitely earned its 4.2 star rating. The street fighter in vr concept is a fun one and it was good executed. Although it was a short game (I had it done in about 1,5 - 2 hours) it still managed to fit allot of different areas into the game. Every area was unique and had something to make it different from the rest.
Cool game I give a good 5 stars.

This is basically streets of rage but in vr and its done very well, and is especially fun when playing co op with a friend, this is a true classic in vr and Id love to see a sequel...

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
￼ I really love the game. It reminds me of street of rage. Or double dragon. Very awesome. I love the way you designed it.

reviews.review_title: the thing can't even load the tutorial
reviews.review_description: no matter how many times i log in and log out of the game it just keeps me stuck in a loading screen making me feel like this game was a waste of money

This is totally Double Dragon for vr can't get much better graphics needs an update and these creators need to make more  games with this quality. Maybe a FPS or another Nintendo remake !! This is a beastmode game !
Absolutely love this . Definitely worth a play just to have some ! Great job !!!! ￼
this game was so much fun hope theres gonna be future updates and new characters

This game really needs an update! Such an underrated gem. it’s basically Double Dragon in VR and still holds up.
Played it again today and had forgotten just how polished and fun it is!
3 player 3 player 3 player please
I just wish this game would expand a little more with more levels or secret enemies/bosses

reviews.review_title: It’s like I’m playing street fighter
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun. I just cannot stop playing it every time I want to play it. I always restart my progress because how fun it is and I don’t want to finish the game just yet, but this game is really fun. I recommend playing it.
This is Awesome 👌. Great to have some true arcade, get you moving, great fun and so much more. Great controls, simple story and gets you right into the game.
This game is awesome especially with coop. Imagine double dragon but in VR!!
Lots of fun but we beat it in three hours; Tricky to get multiplayer to work, but once it does it's a blast!

I first played this back on the OG Rift and I thought it was awesome but I played again on Quest 3 and I'm kot sure if it was updated or what, but it is more fun than I remember. Why aren't people talking about this game more?

reviews.review_title: Was very fun game but stopped working
reviews.review_description: Was fun, accidentally work-out game for a  few years but then stopped working. Screen is black .
This game is so underrated, what an innovative way to bring best em up style to VR. Great job
I purchased the game and it would not play I couldn’t lunch it or anything I’m very disappointed.

Game was fun for a bit 
And then motion sickness hit 
Had to take a break from it
The walking made me sick 
Can you make a update on the walking 
Like warping that would be helpful 
Or tunnel vision when the screen gets smaller 
And a easy mode the fighting to extreme 
Thank you

Why is this game so fun I have played through the story like 70 times and a bunch more with my friends but I think a second game would be awesome but many you could add Rag Doll physics to knockouts and it would be great
I like this game but unfortunately it stopped working what can I do to play my game again or give me my money back$$$

This game is awesome ! Great work on the game!
Now this is what you call a arcade game! I hope you make more arcade games as good as this one!
The only bad thing about it is that the game is too short!
This game remind me the feeling of play ff or sor! Realy nice and fun!
All you do is just punch punch punch..
It’s a good game but it’s a short one too

This was the first game I downloaded that didn't use teleport controls. The beat'em up action is fun, and I played through the first level without any technical difficulties. The problem showed up halfway through level one when my stomach started doing backflips.

Apparently, moving around like I'm riding a vaccume robot was messing with my head, which is a shame because I want to play more.

If you're prone to motion sickness, you'll hate this, otherwise it's AWESOME. It's like playing Sega again, but with better graphics and an extra dimension to kick dudes into jukeboxes
Nice hidden gem.  I picked this up on sale and it was well worth the money.  It controls well (not sure how else they could have done kicks), looks ok, a little repetitive, but a lot of fun.

It’s a good game, you punch your way to the terrible crime boss, mr s(Star) mechanics work good The gameplay is awesome it’s short though you could stretch how long the game lasts, but it’s so addictive you might as well just play the entire game. For me it lasted 2-3 days which is not very long but it’s so fun you have to replay I did it like 12 times it has A lot of Replayability to it highly recommended. Sincerely Nolan￼￼ (edit.lasted 2-3 day￼ to play the entire game not 12 replays Worth)￼￼￼
Highly recommend to anyone who loves nastalgia

Would be 5 stars but no voice chat. 
1st world problems but thats why we play multiplayer with friends, to talk to each other! 
Good thing we found a workaround with our cellphones like with the N-Switch!
This is the best funniest game super funny I love it like my family make a part two😱😱😱😱😎😎😎😎😎🥺🥺😎🥺🥺
Good old fashioned fun👍
Best game ever
Rubbish

reviews.review_title: Motion sickness for me right away
reviews.review_description: Game is fun but I feel motion sickness within minutes of playing. Can't recommend because of this. I don't think it should be listed as comfortable but maybe it's just me.

reviews.review_title: Wont play on my brand new OCULUS QUEST
reviews.review_description: Well I was excited for this game. After the lengthy install.....game wont even load properly. Now that it won't even work. I have tried to uninstall. Now sits in my library with uninstalling sign......for last 2 days. I've reset the head set still there. New to oculus and vr. Now even sure how to get my money back for this game. I was going to try and reinstall...but cant even get it to uninstall. Frustrated
Makes me dizzy need refund
Shocking game should be free and even then I still wouldn't play more than 5 mins awfully save your money for a better game avoid
Fan of street of rage on genesis, I downloaded this game and I really enjoy it

I grew up with the 90s beat-em-up games like Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Double Dragon, Streets of Rage, and Final Fight. So naturally playing these games in VR and and entering their world was appealing to me. It has what you would expect with a retro feel, weapons, and just beating up enemies and sending them flying around the screen. The kicking feature looks a little odd, and I wish that there were more levels, but if you grew up playing these types of games in the 90s this is definitely worth checking out. Hopefully in future updates they will provide a part 2 and more levels
This game was sooooo good that I would play it twice but it’s too short of a game so if u make a second one which I hope u do make it more longer.

Was the first game I bought on my quest, and boy was I glad I did. It gives you all the feels from streets of rage in a totally immersive experience. A game I recommend for new and veteran VR players. Well done!

I love beat em ups. Love fighting vr games like Gorn. This looked like a good mix of the two. Don't believe the hype.
Gameplay is super stiff, no blocking options, every hit requires you to wait. 
I'm sure the powers make the game a lot more fun, but when the core combat to get that far is boring and kills your party, you look for a refund.

It's literally like teleporting into your favourite side scrolling beat em up. People that are containing about a lack of immersion are completely missing the point. It's not a realistic physics simulation it's a cheesy 80s action cartoon and it's fantastic.
I would give this game 6 stars if I could!  This really made my retro “Double Dragon” dreams come to life!  I love this game!
This game is a nostalgia home run, but throws you in the game making it even better!
fun...

reviews.review_title: I hate it wish i could refund
reviews.review_description: Boring,to much ,hate the boxing game
I found it really good it reminded me of one of those old school arcade games the bosses are fun I recommend you buy this 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Old school with a VR twist
reviews.review_description: Love the game, reminds me of Final Fight from back in the day. Story isn’t great, but it doesn’t have to be. I love being able to feel like I am actually the character in the game. Great for a workout if you go all out. I don’t get motion sickness so I can’t speak on that as other have. Overall a great game that is a lot of fun.

Just a fun simple game 
Was a blast, I play with my son and my wife on coop mode. Works great.

Really fun game that's has excellent tracking and fun mechanics and really engaging combat. The only down side for me is this game really kicks my motion sickness on. Not the developers fault in the slightest.

This game is awesome. The detail the environment and the interaction with the characters is very lifelike. I also enjoy the Streets of Rage style of gameplay. From seeing all of the action shooter games on VR is a breath of fresh air.  Only thing I can say is don't stand too close to a wall or anybody and make your kids sit down while playing, because you will punch them with an uppercut. 😂

reviews.review_title: It's more of a workout than you expect
reviews.review_description: I just finished level 1, I'm covered in sweat, and my arms are tired. I expected this to be just a nostalgia trip with a clever twist but there are a LOT of enemies, I've been punching for half an hour without more than 10 seconds of rest, and I LOVE it. I wish there was a bit more variety though, like more hit locations and different variations on the effects when enemies get hit, because I've seen them all hundreds of times now.

There are a lot of cool moments. The mini-games are especially amusing. However, the game has one major flaw and that’s that the combat requires no real skill or strategy. Wave your fists at the bad guy and down they go. Look for the “help me” text, free the citizen. Rinse and repeat.

I had fun with the game and it’s certainly worthy of its $20 price tag. But it’s lacking any sort of challenge or difficulty. So the satisfaction you get is more like “hey that’s a cool 80s throwback idea to put in a game” rather than a sense of satisfaction you’d get from defeating a boss in its source material of double dragon.
I played this game with my dad and we had a blast. We are making it a goal to get to the end together. So far one of my best experiences in VR hands down.
Great game

Having played similar games as this on psvr, I did take some time to watch videos on this as I found the previous experiences to be less than what was shown in trailers.  But this game is fun, and a great atmosphere all combine with the perfect mechanics on the quest to become a great solid title.  Will for sure come back to this game often.
